achievements.title: Holding My Name With Pride
achievements.description: Begin your adventure as the real pharaoh.

achievements.description: Defeat Simon Muran at the Pharaoh's Palace.

achievements.description: Defeat Teana at the Duel Ground.

achievements.description: Defeat all three villagers at any Duel Ground.

achievements.description: Defeat Jono at the Duel Ground.

achievements.description: Defeat Seto at the Duel Ground.

achievements.description: Defeat Heishin in a duel during his revolution.

achievements.title: All Is Lost
achievements.description: Perform a last ditch effort after losing to Heishin.

achievements.title: Kaiba's Millennium Rod
achievements.description: Defeat Kaiba in the final match of the tournament.

achievements.title: Reuniting With Friends
achievements.description: Defeat Jono and Teana at the Hidden Duel Ground.

achievements.description: Defeat Seto in the Vast Shrine and rescue Teana.

achievements.description: Obtain the Millennium Necklace from High Mage Secmeton.

achievements.description: Obtain the Millennium Key from High Mage Anubisius.

achievements.title: The End of the Maze
achievements.description: Defeat the Labyrinth Mage and successfully navigate his domain.

achievements.description: Defeat Sebek the Powerful and Neku the Skillful outside the Dark Shrine.

achievements.description: Defeat Heishin outside the Dark Shrine.

achievements.title: Great Duelist Tournament
achievements.description: With the intention to rescue Teana, enter the Vast Shrine and defeat the Labyrinth Mage, Guardian Sebek, Guardian Neku, Heishin, Seto, DarkNite and Nitemare in one go.

achievements.title: War-Lion Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Super War-Lion' by sacrificing 'Frenzied Panda', 'Leogun' and 'Garvas'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Yamadron Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Yamadron' by sacrificing 'Mountain Warrior', 'Koumori Dragon' and 'Wings of Wicked Flame'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Zera Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Zera the Mant' by sacrificing 'King of Yamimakai', 'Wicked Dragon with the Ersatz Head' and 'Ryu-Kishin Powered'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Curse of Millennium Shield
achievements.description: Summon 'Millennium Shield' by sacrificing 'Prevent Rat', 'One-Eyed Shield Dragon' and 'Armored Rat'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Black Luster Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Black Luster Soldier' by sacrificing 'Beaver Warrior', 'Kuriboh' and 'Gaia the Fierce Knight'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Beastly Mirror Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Fiend's Mirror' by sacrificing 'Fiend Refrection #2', 'Wicked Mirror' and 'Fiend Refrection #1'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Gate Guardian Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Gate Guardian' by sacrificing 'Sanga of the Thunder', 'Kazejin' and 'Suijin'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ultimate Dragon Ritual
achievements.description: Summon 'Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon' by sacrificing three separate 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Commencement Dance
achievements.description: Summon 'Performance of Sword' by sacrificing 'Water Omotics', 'Dancing Elf' and 'Bean Soldier'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Hamburger Recipe
achievements.description: Summon 'Hungry Burger' by sacrificing 'Battle Steer', 'Bioplant' and 'Griggle'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Here Comes Sennen Genjin
achievements.description: Summon 'Sengenjin' by sacrificing 'Hitotsu-me Giant', 'Tiger Axe' and 'Millennium Golem'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Prayer for Fairness
achievements.description: Summon 'Skull Guardian' by sacrificing 'M-Warrior #1', 'M-Warrior #2' and 'Kamakiriman'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Curse of Tri-Horned Dragon
achievements.description: Summon 'Tri-Horned Dragon' by sacrificing 'Feral Imp', 'Torike' and 'Black Dragon Jungle King'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Wicked Soul Transfer
achievements.description: Summon 'Serpent Night Dragon' by sacrificing 'Darkfire Dragon', 'Dragoness the Wicked Knight' and 'Obese Marmot of Nefarious'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Cosmo Queen's Prayer
achievements.description: Summon 'Cosmo Queen' by sacrificing 'Princess of Tsurugi', 'Queen's Double' and 'Queen of Autumn Leaves'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Turtle Evolution
achievements.description: Summon 'Crab Turtle' by sacrificing 'Catapult Turtle', 'Kanikabuto' and '30,000-Year White Turtle'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Puppet Manipulation
achievements.description: Summon 'Psycho-Puppet' by sacrificing 'Mysterious Puppeteer', 'Saber Slasher' and 'Blocker'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.description: Summon 'Garma Sword' by sacrificing 'Vishwar Randi', 'Swordstalker' and 'Succubus Knight'.

achievements.description: Summon 'Mask of Shine & Dark' by sacrificing 'Mask of Darkness', 'Masked Clown' and 'Masked Sorcerer'.
